strategy.visual_concept: Highlight the delicious range of brownies with enticing visuals and clear descriptions.
strategy.audience_angle: Targets the craving for visually appealing desserts, appealing to the audience's love for indulgence and sharing food experiences.
strategy.trend_influence: Growing popularity of aesthetically pleasing food photography on social media.
strategy.conversion_rationale: Each slide showcases a specific brownie variety, using high-quality images and enticing descriptions to draw the viewer's attention and compel them to purchase. The hierarchy directs eyes toward the brownie visuals and ends with a strong call to action.

output.cover_concept: A mouthwatering overhead shot of a variety of brownies artfully arranged on a rustic wooden table, with a soft-focus background of café ambiance.

slide_designs.visual: A variety of brownies displayed on a wooden board, with a focus on textures and rich colors.
slide_designs.text_treatment: Headline in bold, 24pt Playfair Display, body text in regular 16pt Lora.
slide_designs.transition_to_next: The board tilts slightly, leading to a close-up of a single brownie.

slide_designs.visual: Close-up of a fudgy brownie topped with nuts and drizzled chocolate, glistening under soft light.
slide_designs.text_treatment: Large header in 24pt Playfair Display stating 'Fudgy Delight', with body text describing flavors in smaller font.
slide_designs.transition_to_next: The brownie slides off to reveal a new brownie flavor underneath.

slide_designs.visual: A brownie with a gooey caramel center, partially sliced to showcase the inside, against a contrasting background.
slide_designs.text_treatment: Header in 24pt Playfair Display reading 'Caramel Bliss', with short tasting notes below.
slide_designs.transition_to_next: The brownie is pulled away, revealing another brownie recipe on the side.

slide_designs.visual: Presentation of a brownie topped with fresh strawberries, with a sprinkle of powdered sugar.
slide_designs.text_treatment: Header in bold 24pt Playfair Display: 'Berry Burst', with enticing description in body text.
slide_designs.transition_to_next: The slide fades out to transition to the next.

slide_designs.visual: A group of brownies in a gift box, styled for gifting, with festive decorations around.
slide_designs.text_treatment: Header in 24pt Playfair Display: 'Perfect for Gifting', with a list of occasions in body text.
slide_designs.transition_to_next: The box opens up, leading to the final CTA slide.

slide_designs.visual: A vibrant end slide featuring a call to action with images of brownies around.
slide_designs.text_treatment: Bold, standout CTA in 36pt Playfair Display urging viewers to 'Order Your Favorites Today!' in a contrasting color to grab attention.
slide_designs.transition_to_next: The slide has a gentle zoom out effect to emphasize the call to action.

output.cta_slide_concept: Bold, vibrant image of assorted brownies, with a clear call to action emphasizing the urgency to order or visit the café.

design_system_typography.body_treatment: Regular weight, 16pt, sentence case, line height 1.5
